ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defenseman) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* The player's birth date */,
  "height" INTEGER /* The player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* The player's weight in pounds */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* The round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* The position the player was drafted at */,
  "status" TEXT /* The player's current status (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "logo" TEXT /* The team's logo */,
  "arena" TEXT /* The team's home arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* The team's arena capacity */,
  "division" TEXT /* The team's division */,
  "conference" TEXT /* The team's conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, exhibition) */,
  "game_length" INTEGER /* Length of the game in minutes */,
  "home_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the home team */,
  "away_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the away team */,
  "home_penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes for the home team */,
  "away_penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes for the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties taken by the player */,
  "time_on_ice" REAL /* Time on ice for the player in minutes */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of blocked shots by the player */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff wins by the player */,
  "faceoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff losses by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* The player's plus/minus rating for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the team */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties taken by the team */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals scored by the team */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed goals scored by the team */,
  "faceoff_win_percentage" REAL /* The team's faceoff win percentage for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties taken by the player */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* The player's points per game average for the season */,
  "goals_per_game" REAL /* The player's goals per game average for the season */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* The player's assists per game average for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the team */,
  "points_percentage" REAL /* The team's points percentage for the season */,
  "goals_for_average" REAL /* The team's goals for average per game for the season */,
  "goals_against_average" REAL /* The team's goals against average per game for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
